name: Sweet and Sour Whole Fish B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and scale the fish, leaving on the head and tail. Pat dry. Lightly season the inside and outside of fish with salt and make three slashes 1/4-inch deep on each side for better cooking.
2. Brush the fish with the beaten egg then roll in the flour. Pour 3 inches of oil into a roasting pan and heat to 375°F. Test the temperature by dropping in a cube of bread. If it raises to the surface immediately and browns, the oil is ready.
3. Immerse the head in the oil very gently to avoid splattering; slide in the rest of the fish. Deep-fry 3 to 5 minutes on each side. Remove and drain on paper towels. Lay the fish on a serving platter and cover with the sweet and Sour Sauce. Serve immediately.
